'''talolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaccho|zaccho]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-l-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaccho|zaccho]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| talolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæleleth|tæleleth]] || [[word:tælelej|tælelej]] || [[word:tælelesh|tælelesh]] || [[word:tælele|tælele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:talololoth|talololoth]] || [[word:talololoj|talololoj]] || [[word:talololosh|talololosh]] || [[word:talololo|talololo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:taloloth|taloloth]] || [[word:taloloj|taloloj]] || [[word:talolosh|talolosh]] || [[word:talolo|talolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:talofloth|talofloth]] || [[word:talofloj|talofloj]] || [[word:taloflosh|taloflosh]] || [[word:taloflof|taloflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:talolotho|talolotho]] || [[word:talolojo|talolojo]] || [[word:talolosho|talolosho]] || [[word:taloloko|taloloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:taloloth|taloloth]] || [[word:taloloj|taloloj]] || [[word:talolosh|talolosh]] || [[word:talolo|talolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:talolothol|talolothol]] || [[word:talolojol|talolojol]] || [[word:taloloshol|taloloshol]] || [[word:talolokol|talolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:talolothotho|talolothotho]] || [[word:talolojojo|talolojojo]] || [[word:taloloshosho|taloloshosho]] || [[word:taloloko|taloloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:talolothon|talolothon]] || [[word:talolojon|talolojon]] || [[word:taloloshon|taloloshon]] || [[word:talolokon|talolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:talolothoro|talolothoro]] || [[word:talolojoro|talolojoro]] || [[word:taloloshoro|taloloshoro]] || [[word:talolokoro|talolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
